reviews.review_description: Just joined the game and “owner” kept kicking me out not letting me even test the game. I know its in early access but jeez, treating players like this is not good start.

developer_response.body: So sorry for the issue, that was a modder. I wouldn't do something like that. A fix is being worked on, so there isn't anything to worry about :)

reviews.review_description: Playermodel looks tiny, its unclear what to do in the story mode, Textures that look streched have not been fixed with UV Editor, cosmetics are not what they look like (sword for example, i thought i was a holdable). In General, the game was made by Lazy Devs
Pretty cool game I like it. That’s pretty fun to explore, but can you add more levels please but it is a good game. I really like the backrooms. ￼
There weren't that many monster the moderated i met was cool and w game i suggest this game.

reviews.review_title: Something in my game doesn't feel right
reviews.review_description: my game has been empty like something just erased me i'm still here but no one else is it feels like I'm not supposed to be here is this normal?
Then I press snap turn it doesn’t work. plz fix this

This is a very good game it has a wonderful community and tons of goofy stuff. So in total I think this deserves more players bc If this game never existed I would probably quit vr bc it’s getting a little boring but anyways ITS A VERY PEAK GAME!🥳🎉. Oh one more thing…STOP GOONING TO THE TV MAN!!!
There is no need to explain it’s just peak 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Ranging from the very creative story to the interesting secrets, it's hard not to love this game. It has a great community and staff team. They are always trying to help others and make the game safer. I personally recommend this if you're looking for a chill, Backrooms inspired, story game.
Most players kick me out immediately and I cant play the game. I know its in early access but the controls are terrible as well. Can't even enable snap turn or use any setting.

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm so sorry about your issue. Those players you're experiencing are modders. I'm working on stopping them and fixing the sticky movement/snap turning as well. Hope you understand. Thank you for your time :D

reviews.review_description: It was fun but fell out of the map wiles playing story mode  so had to restart
in the time i played this game there was genuenly nothing. Just a mid game

reviews.review_title: The Best Game ive ever Played!
reviews.review_description: If your thinking about downloading this game, do it! The skins and cosmetics are really cool and the community is really nice. If you meet Rando, he is cool and nice. This game has story mode and pvp.
THIS IS THE BEST GAME EVER and I also got to meet a moderater,ace,rando, and entity. They know me as GNARPNY 10/10

You can tell effort was put in this game, the title screen is really cool! I've never seen anything like it, it really shows how creative this game is! Some things they could improve on is the lag, but nonetheless its a great game! (i cant wait for the next levels in the backrooms to come out)
Owner was cool i enjoyed the game the hallway level almost killed me but awsome game 🙏🥹🥹🥹
Very bobo
Can Alan and screen man kiss it’ll be so tuff
i like the game lots. its well made and the communitys very nice! enjoy it lots will be playing the game! but sometimes it can be a bit laggy but its aight
Daily updates ( pretty much ) decent amount of levels. The cosmetics are FIRE! Also the staff team is great, 10/10 game!
I totally recommend this game. It’s great to play with friends and family lots of active members and the staff team is so friendly.
Pretty good game, very unique, also great effects, music, and graphics.
